title: rosa × dumetorum subvar. perciliata
intro: Rosa × dumetorum subvar. perciliata, also known as the Rosa × dumetorum, is a hybrid species of rose that belongs to the family Rosaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine, with medicinal properties attributed to its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Rosa × dumetorum subvar. perciliata include its ability to reduce inflammation and improve cardiovascular health, as well as its potential to exhibit antimicrobial and antiviral activities. Herbal preparations of this plant include infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, but further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
